info.title: ⚠️  Your PATH does not include ~/.dotnet/tools so the command may not be found.
info.description:
Add this to your shell profile (zsh):
echo 'export PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet/tools"' >> ~/.zshrc
source ~/.zshrc
secretsbak - Backup and restore .NET User Secrets to S3
